{"query":"Jerome Powell current Federal Reserve Board of Governors service status 2026 legal investigation resolved","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1505,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/world/us/justice-dept-close-investigation-federal-reserve-renovations-us-attorney-pirro-2026-04-24/","title":"Justice Dept drops investigation into Fed Chair Powell, removing obstacle to Warsh | Reuters","content":"WASHINGTON, April 24 (Reuters) - The Justice Department is closing its investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, U.S.
Attorney Jeanine Pirro said on Friday, removing an obstacle ​to the confirmation of Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the central bank.
The move by Pirro, a Trump ally and the top federal prosecutor in ‌Washington, D.C., for now ends an inquiry involving renovation costs for Fed buildings that had been rebuked by a federal judge and prompted a key Republican senator to block Trump's nominees to the central bank."},{"url":"https://www.21alivenews.com/2026/04/25/justice-department-drops-criminal-investigation-into-federal-reserve-chair-jerome-powell/","title":"Justice Department drops criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell","content":"Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeannine Pirro, who said Friday her office was ending the probe because the Fed’s inspector general would take it over.
Note well, however, that I will not hesitate to restart a criminal investigation should the facts warrant doing so.”
The DOJ found no evidence of wrongdoing.
Powell’s term as chair expires next month, and Friday’s move paves the way for the Senate to confirm his replacement.
Trump says he wants Kevin Warsh — a former Fed governor and Wall Street banker — to be the next head of the Fed.
Multiple Senate Republicans were pushing the White House to drop the probe so they could work on getting Warsh confirmed.
Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters Friday the investigation into Powell has been a priority for the president.
“The case is not necessarily dropped.
It’s just being moved over to the Inspector General, who has critical tools at their disposal to continue to look into the financial mismanagement at the Fed,” Leavitt said.
Powell’s term as chair ends in May, but he could still remain on the Fed’s board.
He serves a separate term as a governor, which lasts until January 2028.
If Powell stays, that would prevent Trump from filling another seat."},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/business/2026/apr/24/doj-drops-criminal-probe-jerome-powell-fed","title":"US justice department drops criminal investigation against Jerome Powell | Federal Reserve | The Guardian","content":"The US Department of Justice is dropping its criminal investigation against the Federal Reserve chair, Jerome Powell, clearing the path for Donald Trump’s new nominee for chair to be confirmed.
Jeanine Pirro, Trump’s appointed US attorney for the District of Columbia, said in a social media post that she had directed her office to close its investigation into renovations at the Fed headquarters that went over budget.
The White House received bipartisan criticism over the investigation, including from Thom Tillis, the Republican senator who said he would block the nomination of Kevin Warsh, Trump’s pick to replace Powell, until the justice department ends its investigation.
But Republicans needed Tillis’s tie-breaking vote to get Warsh through the Senate’s banking committee.
Powell’s term will end on 15 May.
Even with the end of Powell’s investigation, Trump’s prolonged battle with the Fed is not over yet."}]}

WASHINGTON — Jerome Powell said Wednesday he plans to remain on the board of the Federal Reserve after his term as chair ends next month “for an undetermined period of time,” saying the “unprecedented” legal attacks by the Trump administration have put the independence of the nation’s central bank at risk. With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces ...","content":"Jerome Powell is likely in his final weeks at the central bank helm and now faces a choice of whether he stays on at the institution.","score":0.5040288,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/world/us/justice-dept-close-investigation-federal-reserve-renovations-us-attorney-pirro-2026-04-24","title":"Justice Dept drops investigation into Fed Chair Powell, removing ...","content":"## Browse World. WASHINGTON, April 24 (Reuters) - The Justice Department is closing its investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said on Friday, removing an obstacle ​to the confirmation of Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the central bank. The move by Pirro, a Trump ally and the top federal prosecutor in ‌Washington, D.C., for now ends an inquiry involving renovation costs for Fed buildings that had been rebuked by a federal judge and prompted a key Republican senator to block Trump's nominees to the central bank. Pirro said she had instead asked the Fed's internal watchdog, the Office of Inspector General, to examine cost overruns in renovations of the central bank's Washington headquarters. The Powell probe, which ⁠had been examining the renovation and Powell's statements to Congress last year about the project, became the latest flashpoint in the Justice Department's pursuit of adversaries and critics of Trump.","score":0.47285444,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.31,"request_id":"c7abf23f-caec-4c24-875c-56420acd3ec7"}
